info.name: ReviewFlow — course (staging)
info.description: Staging fragment for course. Merged by: cd postman && npm run merge

request.description:
**Variant:** auth
**Path:** /api/v1/courses/{id}
**Setup:** Use 00_SETUP login cookies; Hashids via environment.
**Expect:** 401 without session cookie.

**Variant:** role
**Path:** /api/v1/courses/{id}
**Setup:** Use 00_SETUP login cookies; Hashids via environment.
**Expect:** 403 FORBIDDEN with wrong-role session.
